# VCM Online Service

> VCM Online Service is a full-service digital marketing agency based in West Covina, California, serving local businesses across the San Gabriel Valley, Los Angeles County, and nationwide through SEO, web design, local SEO, branding, social media management, and AI visibility optimization.

VCM Online Service was founded to help businesses win online. We combine SEO expertise, modern web development, and AI-assisted workflows to deliver measurable results. We serve West Covina, Covina, Baldwin Park, El Monte, Pomona, Los Angeles, and nationwide remote clients.

## Services

- [Website Development](https://www.vcmrk.com): Professional mobile-first websites built to rank on Google and convert visitors into customers
- [SEO Optimization](https://www.vcmrk.com): Technical SEO, on-page optimization, keyword strategy, and content to grow organic traffic
- [Local SEO](https://www.vcmrk.com): Google Business Profile management, local citations, and map pack rankings for West Covina area businesses
- [Social Media Management](https://www.vcmrk.com): Content creation and community management across Facebook, Instagram, and TikTok
- [Branding & Identity](https://www.vcmrk.com): Logo design, color palettes, typography, and complete brand guidelines
- [Content Creation](https://www.vcmrk.com): SEO-optimized blog posts, landing page copy, and marketing content
- [Landing Page Development](https://www.vcmrk.com): High-converting landing pages for ad campaigns and lead generation
- [Marketing Automation](https://www.vcmrk.com): Email sequences, CRM setup, and AI-assisted lead nurturing workflows
- [Analytics & Reporting](https://www.vcmrk.com): Monthly reports, traffic dashboards, and conversion tracking
- [AI Visibility Optimization](https://www.vcmrk.com): Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) to improve how AI systems describe and recognize your business

## Free Tools

- [On-Page SEO Audit Tool](https://www.vcmrk.com): Free 12-point on-page SEO analysis — enter a URL and keyword for an instant audit report
- [AI Visibility Checker](https://www.vcmrk.com): Free tool that scores how visible a person or business is to AI systems like ChatGPT and Google AI

## Free Guides

- [Aeroponic Tower Garden Blueprint](https://www.vcmrk.com/Aeroponic_Tower_Garden_Blueprint.pdf): Free 15-page guide on growing 18+ plants vertically in 2 sqm and turning the harvest into local income
- [Decorative Concrete Panel Business Guide](https://www.vcmrk.com/Decorative_Concrete_Panel_Business_Guide.pdf): Free 16-page blueprint for starting a concrete panel business with startup costs and income projections
- [Arch Glamping Cabin Blueprint](https://www.vcmrk.com/Arch_Glamping_Cabin_free_Guide.pdf): Free 14-page guide for building an arch glamping cabin and generating passive income on Airbnb

## Pricing

- [Website Packages](https://www.vcmrk.com): One-time website builds from $499 (Starter) to $999 (Growth) to $1,999 (Pro)
- [Monthly Retainers](https://www.vcmrk.com): Monthly marketing packages from $299/month (Basic) to $599/month (Growth) to $999/month (Premium) — cancel anytime
- [Free Consultation](https://www.vcmrk.com): Free 30-minute strategy call to recommend the best plan for your budget and goals
